title: Peppery Crisp Argentinian Fish Ceviche
description: A refreshing and spicy Argentinian dish featuring fish marinated in a mixture of fish sauce, aekjeot, and shio cure, with a peppery and crisp texture, this gluten-free-friendly recipe is perfect for a light lunch or snack
instructions: Cut the halibut fillets into small cubes and place them in a large bowl
In a small bowl, whisk together the fish sauce, aekjeot, and shio cure
Pour the sauce mixture over the fish cubes and toss to coat
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the fish to marinate
Just before serving, stir in the lime juice, mixed peppers, red onion, and cilantro
Season the mixture with salt to taste
Cover the bowl again and refrigerate for an additional 10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld
Serve the ceviche chilled, garnished with additional cilantro if desired
